description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-icon

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `get_design_tokens`, `find_components_using_token`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Size, color (currentColor inheritance). Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Decorative icons (aria-hidden="true"). Meaningful icons (aria-label). Role="img" when labeled.
3. **Functionality** — Icon loading (SVG sprite, individual fetch, inline). Size variants. Color inheritance. Library/name pattern. Custom SVG slot. Lazy loading.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`. Icon name type union if available.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. currentColor. Sizing via CSS. CSS Parts.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented. Icon library source documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Loading. Sizes. ARIA. Custom SVG. Error handling.
8. **Storybook** — Icon gallery. Sizes. Colors. Custom SVG.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Twig-friendly. Icon module integration.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Icon source configurable.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-icon
